message:
🐛 Compact message bubbles (#8)

- Reduce padding (p:3 → px:10px py:6px), margin (mb:2 → mb:1)
- Inline emoji icon instead of separate label line
- Smaller timestamp (10px, short format like 2:54 PM)
- Tighter paragraph spacing in markdown

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
